About.title: A trusted partner with continuous operations
About.description: We have been continuously providing international and domestic freight forwarding services, organizing solution-based logistics operations.
About.introP1: Andjintrans LLC has been continuously providing international and domestic freight forwarding services since 2011, organizing solution-based logistics operations tailored to each cargo's characteristics (type, size, timeline, temperature/hazard requirements, documentation).
About.introP2: We coordinate air, sea, rail, and road transport individually or in multimodal combinations, managing import/export/transit shipments under one plan and one responsibility. Monitoring shipment progress, documentation, and timeline planning from a single point reduces delays and provides exceptional advantages for project cargo and regular supply chains.
About.missionDescription: To deliver transport-logistics solutions that get our clients' cargo safely, on time, and at optimal cost — with high accountability and transparent operations.
About.visionDescription: To become a trusted standard-setter in Mongolia's market for chemical and special-condition cargo transportation, introducing best international trade and logistics practices.
principles: We prioritize environmentally and socially responsible service.
We uphold workplace safety as our top priority.
We maintain honest and fair principles with our employees, partners, and clients.
About.partnersDescription: We work together with trusted international and domestic partner organizations.
About.dgDescription: Our company has been operating continuously since 2011, with growing expertise in classification, labeling, documentation (SDS/MSDS), packaging, and route risk management for chemical and dangerous goods (DG) transportation.

ServicesSea.title: Cost-Effective
ServicesSea.description: Sea freight is the most common solution for transporting large volumes over long distances cost-effectively.
ServicesSea.introP1: With FCL/LCL options tailored to your cargo volume. As a landlocked country, Andjintrans LLC plans sea-land multimodal routes through neighboring countries' ports, managing the entire process from port/terminal handling to documentation, transit coordination, and final delivery from a single point.
ServicesSea.introP2: We calculate schedules, transit times, and potential delay risks, follow documentation processing standards, and focus on reducing the risk of additional charges (storage/demurrage). We also offer suitable container and loading-securing solutions for oversized, project cargo, and shipments requiring special equipment.

ServicesRail.title: Stable Transit Times,
ServicesRail.description: Rail freight is the best option for transporting heavy, high-volume cargo at stable transit times and lower costs.
ServicesRail.introP1: Leveraging Mongolia's geographic advantages, Andjintrans LLC organizes import, export, and transit rail transport in container and wagon formats, planning multimodal routes combined with road/sea/air when needed.
ServicesRail.introP2: We manage terminal trans-loading, border crossing procedures, documentation, and loading-securing advice from a single point to reduce risks of delays and additional costs. We also offer wagon selection, securing solutions, and route studies tailored to the specific characteristics of project, oversized, and heavy cargo.

ServicesRoad.title: Flexible
ServicesRoad.description: Road freight is the most flexible option for cross-border and domestic delivery.
ServicesRoad.introP1: It offers the best capabilities for precise pickup and delivery scheduling, multi-point loading/unloading, and solving last-mile delivery. Andjintrans LLC plans road transport for import, export, and transit flows tailored to cargo type, size/weight, delivery point, and timeline requirements, organizing the delivery chain from warehouse to terminal to factory to client from a single point.
ServicesRoad.introP2: We also offer solutions for container drayage, bulk cargo, project and oversized/heavy cargo including route studies, permits, and escort transport when needed. By focusing on pre-shipment document checks, customs-terminal coordination, and timeline discipline, we aim to reduce risks of delays and additional costs.

ServicesTransit.title: Through Mongolia
ServicesTransit.description: Transit transport is the service of trans-shipping third-country cargo through Mongolian territory.
ServicesTransit.introP1: This is the form of transport that demands the highest level of route planning, timeline management, documentation, and border-terminal coordination. Andjintrans LLC plans transit flows using rail, road, and multimodal transport options, managing all stages from terminal trans-loading, border crossing, customs procedures, and cargo movement monitoring from a single point.
ServicesTransit.introP2: Transit transport delays typically arise from documentation errors, terminal waiting times, and border coordination delays, so we prioritize data and document pre-checks and route-schedule planning first. When needed, we also integrate additional solutions such as security, insurance, monitoring, and last-mile delivery to reduce risks.

ServicesExport.title: From Mongolia to
ServicesExport.description: Complete export transportation from Mongolia including shipping, documentation, and customs arrangements — all from a single point.
ServicesExport.introP1: Export transport is a comprehensive service for shipping goods, products, and raw materials from Mongolia to foreign countries. This covers all stages including cargo packaging, documentation, customs declarations, transport route planning, insurance, and coordination with the receiving party.
ServicesExport.introP2: We arrange export transportation via all modes — air, sea, rail, and road — to China, Russia, Europe, Southeast Asia, Central Asia and more.

ServicesInsurance.title: A Critical Part of
ServicesInsurance.description: Protection against financial losses caused by risks during transportation.
ServicesInsurance.whatDescription: Cargo insurance protects against financial losses caused by damage, loss, theft, accidents, natural risks, and transport vehicle incidents during shipping. International transport involves multiple transfers, terminals, and trans-shipments, making insurance a critical part of risk management.
ServicesInsurance.whyDescription: The carrier's liability compensation is limited in most cases (based on weight, regulations, contract conditions). Cargo insurance extends protection to match the actual value of goods and contract terms.

t1.title: All Risks
t1.description: Broadest coverage protecting against many types of risks (with detailed conditions).

t2.title: Named Perils
t2.description: Covers only specified risks (e.g., accidents, fire, sinking).

t3.title: ICC (A) – Broad Coverage
t3.description: Commonly understood as 'All Risks', widely used internationally.

t5.title: ICC (C) – Basic Coverage
t5.description: Most limited scope, basic protection only.

t6.title: Additional Coverage
t6.description: War Risks, Strikes/Riots/Civil Commotions (SRCC) when needed.

factors: Incoterms (when risk transfers), who is the insured party
requiredInfo: Special conditions: DG status, temperature regime, special packaging
claimSteps: Record and document damage/shortage upon receipt with photos/video
POD/receipt notes, damage report, arrange survey if needed
Gather invoice, packing list, transport documents (AWB/B/L/CMR/waybill), insurance certificate
Notify insurer within deadline and provide additional information as needed
ServicesInsurance.supportDescription: Andjintrans LLC advises on selecting the right insurance option for your cargo characteristics, route, and timeline requirements, helps prepare insurance documentation, and assists with claim documentation when needed.
ServicesInsurance.ctaDescription: We'll help you select the right insurance option for your cargo, route, and timeline.

ServicesCustoms.title: Timely
ServicesCustoms.description: Customs clearance services for import, export, and transit shipments in compliance with laws and regulations.
ServicesCustoms.whatP1: Customs clearance involves filing declarations, preparing required documents, calculating taxes/duties, and managing inspection processes for import, export, and transit shipments in compliance with laws and regulations.
ServicesCustoms.whatP2: Proper clearance directly affects timely cargo release and reduces risks of additional charges (storage, demurrage, etc.).

s1.title: Pre-Shipment Document Review
s1.description: Identify errors and discrepancies in import/export documents

s2.title: HS Code & Classification
s2.description: Support with HS code classification and related information verification

s3.title: Customs Declaration
s3.description: Filing declarations and advising/arranging required materials

s4.title: Tax & Duty Calculation
s4.description: Preparing correct information for tax calculations (import duty, VAT, etc.)

s5.title: Customs Inspection
s5.description: Coordination for additional documentation when inspection is required

s6.title: Terminal/Warehouse/Delivery
s6.description: Arranging last-mile delivery immediately after customs release

ServicesCustoms.noteDescription: Our service scope can be 'advisory + coordination' or 'full arrangement' depending on your internal organization and customs broker/partnership.
ServicesCustoms.ctaDescription: Contact us about HS codes, tax calculations, and documentation.

ServicesDomestic.title: Delivery in Ulaanbaatar
ServicesDomestic.description: Delivery service for goods, equipment, raw materials, containers, and bulk cargo between warehouses, terminals, factories, and clients.
ServicesDomestic.introP1: Domestic road delivery is a service for safely and timely delivering goods, equipment, raw materials, containers, and bulk cargo between warehouses, terminals, factories, and clients in Ulaanbaatar and rural areas.
ServicesDomestic.introP2: Andjintrans LLC arranges both 'last-mile' delivery connected with international transport and standalone domestic transport on schedule, selecting vehicles based on cargo type, weight/dimensions, and unloading conditions.
ServicesDomestic.typesTitle: What Types of Delivery Do We Provide?
ServicesDomestic.useCasesTitle: When is This Service Most Needed?
useCases: When international cargo needs urgent delivery to factory/warehouse after customs release
When city distribution with multi-point unloading is needed
When regular supply delivery to rural project, construction, or factory sites is needed
When large, heavy equipment or project cargo needs special delivery conditions
quoteInfo: Loading and unloading address, contact person
Unloading conditions (crane needed, ramp/platform, floor delivery requirements, etc.)
ServicesDomestic.ctaDescription: Send us your cargo information, loading/unloading addresses, and timeline to receive a quote.
